title: Button Visibility Experiment
summary: Testing the impact of hiding a specific button on user behavior and engagement metrics.
hypothesis: By hiding the button, we expect to see changes in user interaction patterns and potentially improve the overall user experience by reducing clutter or confusion.
notes: Related PR: https://github.com/klaviyo/fender/pull/53280. Consider reaching out to #C01U0TXAR0B channel for more context.
control_description: Current experience with the button visible
